mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY NOTC.REG_DATE, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM) AS ROW_NUM , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_ICON , (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as REG_DATE , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ' ~ ' TO_CHAR(NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NOTICE_DATE , NOTC.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.BUYER_CD, 'KO') AS BUYER_NM , NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.START_DATE , NOTC.END_DATE , NOTC.REG_USER_ID REG_USER_ID , GETUSERINFO(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS REG_USER_TYPE , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_ICON_IMAGE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND NOTC.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNCM VNCM ON (VNCM.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND VNCM.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'E') LEFT JOIN STOCNOTV NOTV ON (NOTV.GATE_CD = NOTC.GATE_CD AND NOTV.BUYER_CD = NOTC.BUYER_CD AND NOTV.DEPT_CD = NOTC.DEPT_CD AND NOTV.NOTICE_NUM = NOTC.NOTICE_NUM AND NOTV.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCI' -- 납품게시판 AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (NOTC.VIEW_TYPE = 'USNA' OR (NOTC.VIEW_TYPE = 'USXX' AND NOTV.COMPANY_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) OR NOTC.VIEW_TYPE = 'USNE')
AND ( (NOTC.START_DATE >= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_TO_DATE})) OR (NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE <= (#{ADD_TO_DATE})) OR (NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_TO_DATE})) )
AND (NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}))
AND (NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_TO_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_TO_DATE}))
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REG_USER_NM}) '%'
AND GETUSERINFO(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') = CASE WHEN #{VIEW_TYPE} = 'USNI' THEN 'O' WHEN #{VIEW_TYPE} = 'USNC' THEN 'B' ELSE '' END
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.BUYER_CD, 'KO')) like '%' UPPER(#{VIEW_TYPE_S}) '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUM DESC

SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , CASE WHEN GETUSERINFO(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') = 'O' THEN 'USNI' ELSE 'USNC' END AS VIEW_TYPE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS START_DATE , (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS END_DATE , (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , NOTC.REG_USER_ID , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM , NOTC.BUYER_CD , CUST.CUST_NM AS BUYER_NM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC LEFT JOIN STOCUSER UR ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = UR.GATE_CD AND NOTC.REG_USER_ID = UR.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND NOTC.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM = #{NOTICE_NUM}
